summary: Goal Tracker widget testing complete. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend Goal Tracker features working correctly including progress bars, trend indicators, goal achieved badges, and editable targets. All 8 dashboard pages still load in demo mode.
passed_tests: POST validates k_factor_target max (0-5) - rejects 6.0 with 422
POST validates k_factor_target min (0-5) - rejects -1.0 with 422
POST validates demo_signup_target max (0-100) - rejects 150.0 with 422
POST validates demo_signup_target min (0-100) - rejects -5.0 with 422
POST validates demo_pro_target max (0-100) - rejects 200.0 with 422
GET /api/admin/analytics returns trends_24h for all periods (24h, 7d, 30d, all)
Goals reset to defaults after tests
Admin Analytics page loads with Goal Tracker widget (data-testid='goal-tracker-widget')
Goal Tracker shows 3 progress bars (data-testid='goal-metric-0', goal-metric-1, goal-metric-2)
Goal Achieved badges shown when metric >= target (data-testid='goal-achieved-*')
Edit Targets button opens input fields (data-testid='edit-goals-btn')
Goal inputs accept numeric values (data-testid='goal-input-k_factor_target', etc.)
Save Goals button saves and shows toast (data-testid='save-goals-btn')
KPI cards visible above Goal Tracker (data-testid='kpi-demo-opens')
Conversion Funnel visible below Goal Tracker (data-testid='conversion-funnel')
critical_code_review_comments: GoalsPayload Pydantic model correctly validates k_factor_target (0-5) and demo_signup_target/demo_pro_target (0-100)
Goals stored in MongoDB analytics_goals collection with _id='goals'
trends_24h field correctly calculates 24h vs previous 24h comparison for all 3 metrics
Frontend Goal Tracker widget correctly displays progress bars, badges, and trend indicators
Edit mode toggles correctly between view and edit states
Toast notification shown on successful save

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Goal Tracker features + 8 dashboard pages working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Goal Tracker widget added to Admin Analytics page. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/analytics/goals. GET /api/admin/analytics now returns trends_24h field. Key test-ids: goal-tracker-widget, goal-metric-0/1/2, goal-achieved-0/1/2, goal-trend-0/1/2, edit-goals-btn, save-goals-btn, goal-input-k_factor_target, goal-input-demo_signup_target, goal-input-demo_pro_target. Default goals: {k_factor_target: 1.0, demo_signup_target: 15.0, demo_pro_target: 5.0}.

features_tested.get_goals_endpoint: PASS - Returns goal targets with validation
features_tested.post_goals_endpoint: PASS - Saves targets with Pydantic validation (k_factor 0-5, signup/pro 0-100)
features_tested.trends_24h_field: PASS - Returns 24h trend data for all 3 metrics
features_tested.progress_bars: PASS - Shows current/target values with percentage
features_tested.goal_achieved_badges: PASS - Green badges when metric >= target
features_tested.needs_attention_badges: PASS - Red badges when metric < 50% of target
features_tested.edit_targets: PASS - Opens input fields for all 3 targets
features_tested.save_goals: PASS - Saves to backend and shows toast
features_tested.kpi_cards: PASS - Still visible above Goal Tracker
features_tested.conversion_funnel: PASS - Still visible below Goal Tracker
